channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump moment with Modi at G7 sparks online commentary after assistance on summit steps
item.description: During the 52nd G7 Summit in Évian-les-Bains, France, a brief interaction between U.S. President Donald Trump and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi drew widespread attention on social media and in t...

item.title: Senate Republican Leader Acknowledges Public Funds Will Contribute to White House Ballroom Project
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune acknowledged that U.S. taxpayers are expected to cover a significant portion of the costs associated with President Donald Trump's planned White House ballroom projec...

item.title: Liberal government accelerates passage of key legislation amid opposition complaints over limited debate
item.description: OTTAWA — The federal Liberal government, led by Prime Minister Mark Carney, is using its parliamentary majority to speed up the passage of several pieces of legislation during the final sitting week b...

item.title: Waxing Crescent Moon Visible on June 16 With 7% Illumination After the New Moon
item.description: The article explains the Moon’s appearance on June 16, 2026, following the recent New Moon phase. According to NASA’s Daily Moon Guide, the Moon is now in its Waxing Crescent phase, with approximately...

item.title: Libertarian Senate Candidate Remains on Iowa Ballot, Potentially Complicating Republican Election Strategy
item.description: A political development in Iowa could affect the state's upcoming U.S. Senate race after Libertarian candidate Thomas Laehn successfully remained on the ballot despite efforts to challenge his candida...

item.title: Parametric Insurance Expands as Communities Seek Faster Climate Disaster Recovery Funding
item.description: The article examines the growing use of parametric insurance as climate change increases the frequency and severity of natural disasters while traditional insurance models struggle to remain viable. U...

item.title: More Canadians turn to crowdfunding platforms to cover basic living expenses amid rising costs
item.description: A growing number of Canadians are turning to crowdfunding platforms such as GoFundMe to help cover essential living expenses as the cost of rent, groceries, and utilities continues to rise. According ...

item.title: Speculation Grows Over Possible Defections in Shiv Sena (UBT) as Party Leadership Denies Split Rumours

item.title: Nearly 100,000 Tennessee Residents Lose SNAP Benefits Following New Federal Eligibility Rules

item.description: Election officials across the United States are expressing concern that President Donald Trump's executive order on mail voting could create significant administrative and logistical difficulties ahea...

item.title: Rep. Jamie Raskin Accuses FBI Director Kash Patel of Improperly Distributing Bonus Payments to Close Associates

item.title: Agent Island: macOS notch-based workspace for managing local AI coding agent sessions
item.description: The article introduces a developer-built macOS utility called Agent Island designed to improve the workflow of users running multiple local AI coding agents. The creator explains that while tools such...

item.title: Major Political, Justice, Security and Environmental Developments Reported Across Africa on June 16, 2026
item.description: This AllAfrica regional news roundup highlights several significant developments from across the continent on 16 June 2026. In Niger, the military-led government issued a decree provisionally revoking...

item.title: A Retrospective on Anne Heywood’s Career and Enduring Presence in Mid-Century Cinema
item.description: This article from Vintage Everyday celebrates the life, career, and screen presence of British actress and former model Anne Heywood (1931–2023). Rising to prominence during the 1950s and 1960s, Heywo...
